chunks.title: Invitation to the Garden
chunks.reason: The bride speaks of entering her garden and invites friends and lovers to feast.

chunks.title: The Beloved at the Door
chunks.reason: A narrative sequence describing the bride's hesitation, her delay in opening the door, and the subsequent search for her beloved.

chunks.title: Question of the Daughters
chunks.reason: The daughters of Jerusalem ask what makes the beloved superior to others.

chunks.title: Description of the Beloved
chunks.reason: The bride responds with a detailed poetic catalog describing her beloved's physical beauty.
